headline: A private Claude Code plugin marketplace.
subhead: A domain-neutral orchestration core plus specialist teams that travel with you across projects — bundled rules, agents, dispatch playbooks, and templates.

categories.label: Core & Delivery
categories.blurb: The domain-neutral foundation every plugin builds on — the Team Lead and protocols — plus product, project, and process delivery.

categories.label: Software Engineering
categories.blurb: Backend, frontend, mobile, databases, APIs, QA, performance, embedded/IoT, games, auth, and blockchain.

categories.label: Cloud, DevOps & Platform
categories.blurb: AWS / Azure / GCP, Kubernetes, Terraform, CI/CD, internal developer platforms, observability/SRE, and cloud-cost FinOps.

categories.label: Data & Analytics
categories.blurb: Data platforms, streaming, data science, analytics engineering, statistics, BI/Tableau, and data governance.

categories.label: AI & Machine Learning
categories.blurb: Building with Claude, model-selection guidance across coding tools, RAG systems, and ML engineering.

categories.label: Security & Compliance
categories.blurb: Application/cloud security engineering, cybersecurity GRC, the regulatory lane, and ESG / sustainability reporting.

categories.label: Microsoft & Enterprise Platforms
categories.blurb: Power Platform, Fabric, Graph, M365 Copilot, and Salesforce delivery craft.

categories.label: Web, Design & Content
categories.blurb: Web design & build, accessibility, technical writing, localization / i18n, and film & video production.

categories.label: Finance, Fintech & Insurance
categories.blurb: Corporate finance / FP&A, accounting, payments engineering, wealth management, mortgage lending, and insurance.

categories.label: Healthcare & Life Sciences
categories.blurb: Behavioral health, clinical trials, dental, hospice, medical revenue cycle, pharmacy, senior care, and veterinary.

categories.label: Industrial, Supply Chain & Energy
categories.blurb: Manufacturing, supply-chain planning, procurement, fleet & freight logistics, field service, renewable energy, and precision ag.

categories.label: Sales, Marketing & CX
categories.blurb: RevOps, marketing operations, customer-success analytics, support / CX operations, and DTC e-commerce.
